incorrects.description: Student placed wrong tile on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Count the total flowers in all 4 groups.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong tile on second attempt

params.description: One group highlights to show 7 flowers.

steps.text: Each group has 7 flowers. 4 groups means you count 7 four times. Count them all and place that number.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong tile three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: Each group lights up as the guide counts: 7, 14, 21, 28.

steps.text: Let me show you. I count each group: 7, 14, 21, 28. Four groups of 7 equals 28 total. The total is 28, so 28 equals 4 times 7.
